titleStmt.title: SII 24.324: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 324. (A.R. No. 50 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records in Tamil verse the several gifts made and services rendered by Chakrarāya to the temple, such as (1) 1,000 kaḻañju of gold for a dish, (2) conse- cration of the image of Deyvappuḷḷūrvār, (3) 1,000 kaḻañju of gold for the pedestal of the goddess, (4) 1,000 kaḻañju of gold for a gold lamp-stand, (5) a golden pot worth 1,000 kaḻañju of gold, (6) a pearl garment, (mutta bhishēkam) and (7 1,000 kaḻañju of gold for a gold platter vaṭṭil and pedestal. The details of the date of all the gifts correspond respectively to (1) A.D. 1424, April 17, Monday; ·44. (2) A.D. 1425, December 30, Sunday (śu. 6), ·80; ·39, (3) A.D. 1427, July 19, Saturday, ·64, (4) A.D. 1427, October 15, Wednesday, (ba. 10); ·79; ·64. (5) A.D. 1428, November 3, Wednesday, 23. (6) A.D. 1430, January 24, Tuesday, ·06. and (7) A.D. 1430. February 24, Friday, ·18.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruntu varuṣaṅ kuṟoti cittiraināṭ keṭṭai varuntiṟutikai naṟṟiṅkaḷ vārattaraṅkaṟ, kamaitta kaḻañcāyirattālam poṟṟaḷikai, camaittaḷittāṉ cakrarāyaṉ . 1
māṉil mel viśvāvasuvaruṣat taittiṅkaṭ pāṉuviṉiluttira ṉāṭ pañcamiyil mīṉamicait tekku pukaṭRead tekku pukaḻ The sandhi should make it tekku pukaṭeyva on the analoṅy of tikaṭacakkara of ṭiruppuṅat6teyvap puḷḷūrvāṟkuc cīṟRead cīrpipu taiyākkuvit tāṉ cakrarāyaṉ . 2
Āynta pilavaṅkatti lāṭicaṉi rokaṇiyilāynta pacumpoṟ kaḻañcorāyirattāṟ kūrntu ṉalañ ceyaraṅ kecarkku ṉāccimār pīṭamalaṅkarittāṉ cakrarāyaṉ . 3
poṟ kaḻañ corāyirattāṟ poṟṟum pilavaṅkattaṟpaciyiṉāḷ makatti littecamic coṟ putaṉi, lā
rntamaittāṟ cakrarāyaṉaraṅkaṟkaṉpu kūrntaḷittāṉ kuttu viḷakku 4 kilakattiṟ kārttikaiyiṟ ke
mputaṉiluttirattil mel parappiṉṉoṉṟila tāṉ kaḻañ cāyirattālāṭu puṉaṟ poṟkuṭattai tāṉaḷittāṉ cakrarāyaṉ 5
tāṇuvām saumya vakuṣamuyar taiyyayaṉa moṇañ cevvāy tutikaiyoṇ mīṉam peṇum nāḷ vāytta varaṅkaṉāṟku maṇimuttapiṣekam cāttiṉāṉ cakrarāyaṉ . 6 virum periya naṟsaumyamāci makamu veḷḷa, virumpu ttiraṭṭāti mīṉattaraṅkaṟkām, potukaḻañcāyirattāṟ poṉvaṭṭil vetikaiyīn, tātarittāṉ cakrarāyaṉ . 7
Digital edition of SII 24.324 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
